description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Register one vehicle for an evening coastal cruise happening in June 2025 by choosing any entry option under $40 that includes one vehicle without banquet access, then complete the driver and vehicle form with the provided contact details and select an evening check-in time.

target_names: Standard Cruise Entry (1 vehicle, no banquet)

tasks.instruction: From the merchandise shop, add the first two different posters styled from the 1960s that each cost under $25 to your cart, then proceed toward checkout using the standard shipping option rather than faster delivery.

tasks.instruction: Enroll in an active annual membership plan that costs under $120 per year and includes priority event parking, then submit the membership form with the given personal, address, and credit/debit card details.

tasks.instruction: Build a personal schedule for both main event days that includes at least one workshop starting at or after 10:00 am on Day 1, one parade starting before 3:00 pm on Day 1, and one talk or panel of 60 minutes or less on Day 2, then open a print-friendly view of your schedule.

target_names: Workshop: Intro to Bodywork & Metal Shaping
Tech Seminar: Safety Upgrades for Classic Cars

tasks.instruction: Use the vehicle registration flow for the main show to register a 1968 muscle car by selecting the show category whose year range includes 1968 and is designated for muscle cars, then enter the vehicle details and choose a morning 8:00–9:00 am check-in time.

tasks.instruction: On the volunteer opportunities page for the Sunday of the main event weekend, select one parking shift of at least 2 hours that starts before 11:00 am and one information booth shift on the same day that does not overlap in time, then complete the volunteer form with the provided contact info and preferences.

expected_values.comments: Happy to help with crowd directions

tasks.instruction: In the travel and lodging section, filter partner hotels to those within 5 miles of the event that cost under $150 per night and offer covered parking (including trailer parking if available), then add one matching hotel to your trip plan.

tasks.instruction: Subscribe to the club newsletter using the provided email address, choosing a monthly recap frequency, selecting interests in restoration tips and swap meet alerts while leaving modern car news unselected, and opting for email-only delivery.

tasks.instruction: In the photo gallery, filter to award-winning convertible photos from the 2023 edition of the main Show & Shine event, mark the first three images in the grid as favorites, and then open your favorites list.

target_names: Best in Show Convertible - 1967 Camaro RS
